section.purpose: Uppercase section headers paired with a 1px rule.

body.purpose: Compact labels, checkbox text, and short messages.

meter.purpose: FPS, peak, frame count, plot metadata.

breakpoints.name: top-split
breakpoints.value: 920px live or PSF view, 320px stage view

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary scan or connection action. Signal fill, rectangular, compact.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #9fc6dc; color: #171a1c; border: 1px solid #9fc6dc; padding: 6px 14px; min-height: 22px; font-family: Inter, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b8d7e8; border-color: #b8d7e8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #7aa9c5; border-color: #7aa9c5; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #ddd8cd; color: #6f7470; border-color: #b8b1a3; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Secondary instrument command. No fill until hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { background: transparent; color: #2a2f32; border: 1px solid #b8b1a3; padding: 6px 14px; min-height: 22px; font-family: Inter, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn:hover { background: #ddd8cd; border-color: #6f7470; } .ds-btn:active { background: #f7f5ef; } .ds-btn:disabled { background: #ddd8cd; color: #6f7470; border-color: #b8b1a3; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Disconnect or stop action. Danger appears only on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: transparent; color: #2a2f32; border: 1px solid #b8b1a3; padding: 6px 14px; min-height: 22px; font-family: Inter, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { color: #b55345; border-color: #b55345; } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { background: #ddd8cd; color: #6f7470; border-color: #b8b1a3; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Spinbox
components.description: Numeric field for stage, exposure, gain, levels, threshold, and interpolation values.
components.css: .ds-spinbox { background: #f7f5ef; color: #171a1c; border: 1px solid #d4cfc3; padding: 4px 6px; min-height: 22px; min-width: 78px; font-family: 'Iosevka Term', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Cascadia Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; border-radius: 0; outline: none; } .ds-spinbox:focus { border-color: #9fc6dc; } .ds-spinbox:disabled { background: #ddd8cd; color: #6f7470; border-color: #b8b1a3; } .ds-spinbox::selection { background: #7aa9c5; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Uppercase label plus 1px rule. This is the section separator instead of a card.
components.css: .ds-section { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 0 6px 0; } .ds-section-label { color: #171a1c; font-family: Inter, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-section-rule { flex: 1 1 auto; height: 1px; background: #d4cfc3; }

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Two-mode top tabs for LIVE IMAGE and PSF STACK.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; background: transparent; } .ds-tab { background: transparent; color: #626a6c; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; padding: 6px 14px; min-width: 60px; font-family: Inter, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1px; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #626a6c; } .ds-tab.is-selected { color: #171a1c; border-bottom-color: #9fc6dc; } .ds-tab:disabled { color: #6f7470; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Scan progress with Signal chunk and centered mono text.
components.css: .ds-progress { position: relative; background: #f7f5ef; border: 1px solid #d4cfc3; height: 14px; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; min-width: 200px; } .ds-progress-fill { background: #9fc6dc; height: 100%; } .ds-progress-text { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: grid; place-items: center; color: #626a6c; font-family: 'Iosevka Term', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; }

components.name: Stage Legend
components.description: Three mutually exclusive scan point states.
components.html: current possampledplanned
components.css: .ds-stage-legend { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px 14px; background: #f7f5ef; border-top: 1px solid #d4cfc3; padding: 4px 10px; color: #6f7470; font-family: 'Iosevka Term', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; } .ds-swatch { width: 8px; height: 8px; display: inline-block; } .ds-current { background: #9fc6dc; } .ds-sampled { background: #5f8f83; } .ds-planned { background: #b8b1a3; }

narrative.overview:
PSF Scan is a bright, low-drama instrument panel for a single optical bench workflow. The user is moving a stage, watching a camera image, and checking PSF stack output; the interface must stay physically quiet while the plotted data stays legible. The concrete scene is a microscope desk under mixed lab and office lighting, where a dark UI would hide surface detail and a glossy UI would steal attention from the PSF image.

The system is PySide6 / pyqtgraph first: QSS supplies the control vocabulary, pyqtgraph owns image and plot rendering, and custom widgets only exist when they make measurement faster.
keyCharacteristics: Warm light plotting surfaces, never pure white and never theatrical dark mode.
Rectangular controls, 1px rules, no shadows, no card stacking.
Numeric information is mono by default; labels and buttons use a compact sans.
Signal blue marks current focus and primary action; sampled green marks completed scan points.
PSF intensity belongs to scientific colormaps, not UI decoration.

rules.name: The Plot Owns Color Rule
rules.body: Scientific image colors come from viridis, magma, inferno, plasma, CET-L4, or the volume shell ramp. Do not recolor UI panels to make data feel intense.

rules.name: The Three-State Scan Rule
rules.body: Planned, sampled, and current scan points use Rule Firm, Sampled, and Signal respectively. Never blend these states or add a fourth decorative scan color.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Paper, Panel, Surface, and rules stay warm gray. Pure white, pure black, cold blue-gray, and SaaS navy are prohibited.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any repeated numeric readout uses the mono stack: position, exposure, gain, frame count, FPS, peak, progress, threshold, levels, and interpolation factors.

rules.name: The Small Type Rule
rules.body: This product does not use hero typography. Anything larger than 13px needs a direct measurement reason.

rules.name: The Flat Instrument Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not float. Buttons, inputs, tabs, tooltips, progress bars, and plot panels stay flush with the workbench.

rules.name: The 1px Rule
rules.body: Structural separation is 1px: section rules, splitters, borders, axes, top and bottom bars. Thick accent borders and side stripes are forbidden.

dos: Do keep live images, PSF slices, MIP plots, and stage plots on Paper.
Do use mono typography for every value that changes or aligns with another value.
Do use SectionHeader and 1px rules instead of cards, nested panels, and decorative containers.
Do reserve Signal for current focus, primary action, selected state, focus border, progress fill, and checked state.
Do let pyqtgraph colormaps and volume shell colors communicate intensity and 3D density.
Do expose plot and render errors as visible status text, not silent fallback success.
donts: Don't use 黑底科研软件、终端绿/青配黑底.
Don't use 魁北克蓝 + 黄金 or any navy-and-gold scientific SaaS palette.
Don't add 大而圆润的阴影卡片 or icon-标题-描述三件套.
Don't use decorative gradients, glow, background blur, glassmorphism, or gradient text.
Don't add border-left or border-right accent stripes greater than 1px.
Don't use border radius. 0px is the project-level shape token.
Don't make animations or UI transitions longer than 200ms.
Don't use the red volume shell ramp for buttons, tabs, warnings, or status badges.
